title: ちょっと寄りたいステキな場所

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On our way back to the academy, Gold Ship pulls
me onto a bus, saying there's a place she wants to
go.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ahh... The musty smell, the soft give of the seat,
the gentle sway of the bus... I just can't get
enough.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Headed? We're already here.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: The bus is our destination. C'mon, keep up.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! You can see everything worth seeing in this
world on a bus!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Look! That telephone pole is fighting off an ivy
infestation! Hold strong, oh valiant pole!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Huh, that dog over there's staring right at us. I
wonder if it's trying to relay a message in Morse
code via nose twitches!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
F-E-E-D-M-E... Sorry, pup, I don't have any
snacks on me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship usually gets bored of things quickly,
but the constantly changing scenery beyond the
window seems to hold her attention remarkably
well—

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: All right! I'm bored of this! Let's get off!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...Seems I spoke too soon.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Time to prance, dance, and fly our way back
home, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tracen Academy is quite a ways from here...
choice_data_list: Bear with it and walk the distance.
Convince her to ride a different bus back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Gold Ship and I get off at the next stop.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Now, let's see... Where are we?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hmm? It looks like we're about ten kilometers
away from Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That's not so bad! On deer-back, that'll only take
fifteen minutes, give or take.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Sit tight while I go wrangle us some deer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It takes every ounce of strength I have to stop her
from going up the nearest mountain. We make it
back to the academy eventually, sans deer.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But if I sit still any longer, I'm gonna turn into a
giant clam!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Besides, changing buses when we don't know
where we are is some top-level jutsu―

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Suddenly, she notices something and freezes.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hold on a sec. I know this route... We're on the
loop headed for Tracen Academy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing but sprawling fields and rural
roads outside the windows. The academy isn't on
the list of stops either.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I got bored the other day and memorized
the routes for all the buses 'round here.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Check out that crow! Is it awesome or
what?! Okay, I'm gonna become a bird!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
From now until we get back to the academy, I'm
gonna be a shoebill stork! Don't try to stop me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She starts flapping and squawking, making it
impossible to confirm whether she really does
know the bus route.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But thirty minutes later, we pull up near Tracen
Academy just as Gold Ship predicted.
choice_data_list: You really do have the routes memorized...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Arf! Grr arf! Awoo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Rrright. Anyways, I'm glad we made it back safe
and sound.
